{{Infobox character
| name = Simon
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| abilities = amateur swordsman, Nye essence, Benson's steel, enhanced reflexes, call liquid steel from Valinhall, draw on the Nye's essence to increase his perception of time and reflexes, call steel to join with the cool breath of the Nye, draw on liquid steel to create chain-shaped shadows on his skin, Nye's breath, call steel and summon Azura
| affiliations = Traveler from the Valinhall Territory
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Simon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Simon, the son of [[Kalman]], is a tall and physically strong individual characterized by his dark gold hair and an [[aura]] of confidence. He has spent much of his [[life]] working various jobs to provide for his mother, driven by a fierce determination to ensure her survival. While he lacks an interest in seeking power or authority, he has become a [[Traveler]] of [[Valinhall]] and is identified as the [[Lirial Traveler]]. His [[life]] involves complex connections to [[Damascan]] figures, including an [[Overlord]] and a potential heir, and he has been tasked by the [[Eldest]] to perform work in the outside world.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Simon, the skinny son of [[Kalman]], grew up in [[Myria]] where he cared for his mother and worked cleaning a tavern. After his mother was killed by [[Cormac]], Simon sought help to retrieve villagers taken by [[Overlord Malachi]] and attempted to fight [[Travelers]] despite his lack of talent. Following a period of hardship, he became a [[Traveler]] and accepted a deal from the [[Eldest]] to undergo a trial in [[Orgrith Cave]]. During his training, he learned to utilize [[Nye essence]] and [[Benson's steel]] to enhance his reflexes and strength, a process that manifests as moving, chain-like marks on his skin. Now a young man who can summon the [[sword]] [[Azura]], he uses these gifts to increase his speed and perception of time.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is an eight-year-old boy.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is the son of [[Kalman]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] prefers working quietly and by himself.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has a [[sword]] hidden in a dusty rug in his house.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a character who has cared for his mother since he was a boy.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a skinny boy.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3">''House of Blades'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] attempted to attack [[Cormac]]'s legs with his [[sword]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's mother]] is unconscious in the cave.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's mother]] is deceased.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is not a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is being held at dagger-point by a man in the forest.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] believes the [[Demon]] of the forest has let him live once before.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] wants help to retrieve people taken from his village by [[Overlord Malachi]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has seen the white-haired man kill [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s hands are wounded.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] wants to learn how to fight [[Travelers]] to bring the people of his village back.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] claims he has no talent.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a character who has been delivering messages and cleaning a tavern.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is an amateur swordsman.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has not eaten in over three days.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] previously lived in a village.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] fought three iron armors before being defeated.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] held forward the shattered remnants of a secondhand weapon he had bought from a desperate merchant’s guard.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has been in [[Valinhall]] for at least a month.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's sword]] is single-edged and curved like [[Azura]] but less than half its length.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] accepted the [[Eldest]]'s deal.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9">''House of Blades'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is traveling on foot with [[Denner]] toward [[Orgrith Cave]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a student undergoing a test in [[Orgrith Cave]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a character who uses the [[Nye essence]] and [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is participating in a trial.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] fought a monster in the cave.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] cannot leave the cave for six nights after the current night.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can push aside a giant mushroom cap with one hand after using a draught of [[steel]] strength.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is motivated to rescue [[Andra]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] possesses enhanced reflexes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a six-year-old.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has chain-like marks on his arms that move and crawl up his skin.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can call [[liquid steel]] from [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a young man who has been a [[Traveler]] for only a few weeks.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can draw on [[the Nye]]'s [[essence]] to increase his perception of time and reflexes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can call [[steel]] to join with the cool breath of the Nye.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can draw on [[liquid steel]] to create chain-shaped shadows on his skin.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|An arrow was shot toward [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] uses [[Nye]]'s breath to gain cool power.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s strength is bolstered by [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s arms are chain-shrouded when using his [[steel]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a person who can call [[steel]] and summon [[Azura]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] sent a message to [[Caela]] thanking her for the warning.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is traveling in a rumbling wagon bed.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a [[Traveler]] from the [[Valinhall]] [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] grew up around [[Nurita]]'s family.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is interested in talking to [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] uses the strength of [[steel]] and the speed of [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s shadow-chains have not yet reached his hands.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] uses [[Nye essence]] to slow time.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can summon the [[sword]] [[Azura]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] wears a black cloak.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is at the house if [[Leah]] is there.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] possesses [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has liquid strength running through him.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has black chains on his forearms that look like living tattoos.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has gifts.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] draws on [[steel]] and [[essence]] to increase his speed.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is the only one in his group who can open a Gate to escape.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is suspected to have died in a canyon between [[Bel Calem]] and [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] lived in [[Myria]] before becoming a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's mother]] was killed by [[Cormac]] during the collection of the sacrifice.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s father was killed at the edge of the [[Latari Forest]] by two [[Travelers]] from [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]]'s father was killed and his mother was tortured into insanity by [[Travelers]] from [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A student of [[Kai]] and a [[Traveler]] who draws power from [[Valinhall]], Simon possesses the ability to call [[steel]] and [[essence]] to infuse his body with cold strength. Having grown up in a village within the [[Damascan Kingdom]], he has fought alone against the [[Damascans]] and killed many of their [[Travelers]], though he is not as opposed to the nation as he pretends. While [[Alin]] attempts to involve him in strategy meetings and missions, Simon maintains a [[Territory]] with his own advisor and has been training alongside his companion [[Indirial]]. During a confrontation where he wore a mask and cloak, Simon fought the [[Valinhall Incarnation]] before falling [[sword]]-first upon [[Valin]]. He eventually awoke in a strange room within an unfamiliar city, carrying a long [[Valinhall]] blade.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] stated he could take care of her.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] possesses a device.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is a [[Traveler]] who draws power from [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] fought against the [[Damascans]] alone.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] wants [[Simon]] to attend a strategy meeting.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]]'s Gate opened onto his suite of rooms in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] grew up in a village that was technically part of the [[Damascan Kingdom]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has killed many [[Damascan Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon's mother]] was killed by a [[Damascan Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is not as set against [[Damasca]] as he pretends to be.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] spoke with [[Malachi]] before [[Alin]] arrived.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has dangerously high influence over [[Eliadel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can call [[steel]] and [[essence]] to infuse his body with cold strength.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is a student or subordinate of [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] emerged from the healing pool with an imp gnawing on his shoulder.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] wants [[Simon]] to accompany them on their mission.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]]'s room was found broken and shattered by battle.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can draw [[Valinhall]] [[steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is someone [[Alin]] intends to have a long talk with if he survives.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can focus his [[Nye essence]] to slow the world.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is observing [[Leah]] and the [[King]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has an advisor from his [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] stepped through the [[Valinhall Gate]] to go home.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] walked through the stone door to the [[rain garden]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] suspects [[Simon]] is trying to kill the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is a person who can call [[steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is working with [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is a companion of [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] stepped out of the Gate determined to never set foot in [[Naraka]] ever again.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has been training with [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can call [[essence]] and [[steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is present in the scene and speaks to [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] has dolls.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] ran through the halls of [[the House]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] suspects a black-cloaked man with a long [[sword]] might be [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] is a character who wears a mask and a cloak.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] feels chains wrapping around his shoulders, ribs, and neck.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] wears a mask.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]]'s eyes are not visible through his mask, only a dim, sourceless light.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] fought the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] was battling the [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] fell on [[Valin]] [[sword]]-first.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] woke up in a strange room in a strange city.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] carries a long [[Valinhall]] blade.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|While studying under [[Valin]] in [[Valinhall]], Simon utilized a [[Nye]]-made crutch and steel-enhanced strength to manage his abilities. During a journey toward [[Enosh]], he employed shadows and the blade [[Azura]] before engaging in combat against [[Alin]]. While fighting, Simon used a mask to summon a massive [[steel]] hammer and release [[Nye essence]], though the subsequent use of the mask left him paralyzed and unconscious. After recovering enough to be declared fit for duty, he watched a staged contest involving the [[Incarnation]] of [[Endross]] and eventually rose from the walls of [[Cana]]. Following a confrontation where he struck [[Grandmaster Naraka]] with a giant hammer, Simon used his powers to bind himself to [[Valinhall]]. Ultimately, the [[Founder]] of [[Valinhall]] accepted the roles of royal protector and custodian of the [[Incarnations]], serving as [[Queen]] [[Leah]]'s personal protector.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses a crutch made by [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses steel-enhanced strength.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has been in debt to the [[Eldest]] since he first came to [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a character who uses [[Nye essence]] and possesses a [[sword]] named [[Azura]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a student being taught by [[Valin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a character who uses the blade [[Azura]] in combat.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] felt like an idiot for answering an obvious question.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has Traveled through [[Naraka]] a handful of times.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses shadows.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] wondered if they would find anything before reaching [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] holds [[Azura]]'s hilt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses a mask that makes his eyes flare white and become transparent.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] can summon a massive hammer made of mirror-bright [[steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses a mask that provides [[steel]] and [[essence]] without running out.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Using the mask causes [[Simon]]'s chains to grow rapidly.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] can release [[Nye essence]] to return the world to near normal speed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] began to fall after the [[Orange Light]] failed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is fighting [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] falls from the sky like a silver-and-black lightning bolt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is currently outside of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses stone, [[steel]], and a mask for protection.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is unconscious.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] wants to help [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is associated with the doll [[Rebekkah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] previously killed soldiers under [[Erastes]]' command.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] needs to take care of [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] was doing things that [[Ilana]] thought were impossible before she left.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] was in [[Valinhall]] before waking up.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a character who was recently paralyzed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is being set up as the [[Founder's heir]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a character.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a character who can open [[Gates]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has chains on his back.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a person [[Leah]] has worked with to seal an [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] enters the throne room through a hole in the stone wall.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] carries a large [[Tartarus steel hammer]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] wears a mask that is half silver and half black.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has recovered enough from the mask that [[Valin]] and the dolls pronounced him fit for duty.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a person [[Indirial]] mentions in relation to the Dragon's Fangs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is away.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has fought the last [[Incarnation]] of [[Endross]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] once saved the [[life]] of a child named [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] watches a staged contest between [[King Zakareth the Sixth]] and the [[Endross Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] considers getting [[Leah]] out of the area.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] rose from the walls of [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is struggling to move his body after using the mask.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is a person who has bargained with the [[Eldest]] before.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] considers telling [[Simon]] about her meeting with [[Queen]] [[Cynara]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is sitting in a graveyard.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] holds the [[sword]] [[Mithra]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is [[binding]] himself to [[Valinhall]] through the use of his powers.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has at least five [[Incarnations]], potentially as many as seven.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] can draw on his power in another [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] slammed a giant hammer onto [[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s head.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|When [[Simon]] hit [[Grandmaster Naraka]], ash sprayed out instead of blood.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] reported that the [[King]] is moving against [[Elysia]] after trying to destroy [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon's sword]] has a line of gold running down the middle that sings to [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] gives orders to [[Andra]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] uses a gold-and-silver blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[White Light]] can empower [[Simon]] with the might of [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has proven his valor.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has accepted the position of [[Queen]] [[Leah]]'s personal protector.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is the [[Founder]] of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] holds the positions of royal protector and custodian of the [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Give me your power, Eldest," Simon said. "I accept your deal."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Then you came! That monster was nothing for you.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“I can’t leave the cave for six nights after this one.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A young, black-cloaked man with a long sword. Even underneath the mask… “Simon?” Alin muttered<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"It would spill everywhere," Simon said, feeling like an idiot for answering such an obvious question.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
